note: PLACEHOLDER — no real AO deployment has been performed. xion-verify ao-handlers reads `status` and returns NOT_YET_SEALED until this file is replaced by a real receipt produced by a successful `aos` deploy. Allowed values for `substrate` (Phase 6.1.b, enforced by xion-verify): "legacynet" (upstream AO testnet via https://cu.ao-testnet.xyz) | "localnet" (Xion-controlled permaweb/ao-localnet Docker stack via http://localhost:4004; see infra/ao-localnet/ and docs/runbooks/AO_DEPLOY_LOCALNET.md). "mainnet" is FORBIDDEN at Phase 6.1; reserved for Phase 6+ Tier-3 ceremony per docs/09-GOVERNANCE.md. The legacy `network` field is retained for backward compatibility but the verifier prefers `substrate`. See KW-AOCORE-001, KW-AOCORE-003, KW-AOCORE-004.
